name: AF Poyry AB (publ)
summary: √É¬ÖF P√É¬∂yry AB (publ) provides engineering, design, and advisory services for the infrastructure, industry, energy, and digitalisation in Sweden, Finland, Norway, Switzerland, Denmark, Germany, and internationally. The company operates in five divisions: Infrastructure, Industrial & Digital Solutions, Process Industries, Energy, and Management Consulting. It provides architecture and design, facility availability and risk management, process measurements, measurement and analysis of flue gas emissions, enhancing district heating and cooling, wind power measurements, BAT expertise, social responsibility development, plant's environmental responsibility development, asset management, permitting and authority issues, safety management, risk analyses, automation and controls, real virtual commissioning, robot programming & olp, industrial digitalization, installation and commissioning, and industrial digitalisation advisory services. The company also offers expert surveys, second opinion surveys, due diligences, risk assessments, optimization surveys, carbon and water footprint calculations, and process safety consulting services. In addition, it provides process engineering, plant and layout design, piping and mechanical engineering, process automation, instrumentation and ICT engineering, process electrical engineering, heat, ventilation, and air conditioning, civil and structural engineering, and electrification, fire, safety and security services. Further, the company provides project management, environmental impact assessments, land use and urban planning, permitting, nature inventories and protection, environment, health and safety audits, waste management, and contaminated soil management services. √É¬ÖF P√É¬∂yry AB (publ) serves IT, defense, energy, forest, chemical, bio-refining, metal and mining, and bio-based industries. The company was founded in 1895 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
